content_gaps: Detailed, step-by-step visuals (photo or video) of the lamination, forging, and patterning process are uncommon. Most explanations are purely text-based.
The tactile experience — what the different finishes (etched vs. smooth) feel like to the touch — is rarely described.
Specific care instructions based on the exact metal combinations are often missing. For example, how to care for a ring with copper/shakudo vs. one with only gold and palladium.
The distinction between true, diffusion-bonded mokume-gane and cheaper, soldered laminates is a nuance often overlooked by retailers.
In-depth discussion of the different pattern types (e.g., twist, star, feather) and how each specific pattern is achieved during the forging process.
